title: Y1 Property
description: Defines the Y1 position of an object where the X1, Y1 coordinate pair define the position of the Starting point of the object.
notes:
Line Object:

The Y1 property is used to locate vertical position for the starting point of a Line object.  This property is initially set to the Y position where the user drops a newly created Line object.  However, if a Point object is associated with another object in the sequence (i.e. the StartPointType property is set to another vision object and not set to "Screen"), then the Y1 property for the Line object is automatically modified according to the associated property.

When the StartPointType property is set to "Screen" there are 2 methods which can be used to move the Line object:

Click the Line object's label and drag the object to the position you want to place it.
Type in X1, Y1 Pixel Coordinate positions for the starting position of the Line object, and then type in X2, Y2 Pixel Coordinate positions for the ending position of the Line object. After you type in a value to the X1, Y1, X2 or Y2 property and move off that property the starting point of the Line object will move to that new X1, Y1, X2 or Y2 position.

Edge Object:

The Y1 property is used to locate vertical position for the starting point of an Edge object.
see_also:
